commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a native .NET/WinForms Windows taskbar tray companion with Windows docs, packaging/smoke/Crabbox scripts, tests, screenshot proof, and a Windows CI job.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR findings: source inspection shows the refresh continuation leaves the UI context, git execution lacks timeout/prompt suppression, the validation script downloads and runs a remote script, and publish omits version MSBuild properties. I did not run Windows because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review is needed because the repairable code defects sit inside a maintainer-owned decision about Windows platform/runtime/installer support and the prior secret-rotation question.
